nodes.name: product/__init__.py
nodes.summary: Package init file — empty, marks product/ as a Python package.

nodes.name: product/models.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic request/response models for the product scraper API: ScrapeRequest, ProductData, ScrapeResponse, BatchScrapeItem, BatchScrapeRequest/Response, ExportToPipelineRequest/Response, ScheduledScrapeCreate/Response, ProductCategory.

nodes.name: product/analyze_models.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic models for AI analysis API: AnalyzeRequest, AnalyzeResponse, BatchAnalyzeRequest/Response, ExportResponse, AnalyzeFromScrapeRequest/Response, ScrapedProductListItem, ScrapedProductListResponse.

nodes.name: product/db_models.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy ORM models for the product scraper: ApiKey (API key auth), ScrapedProduct (cached scrapes), ScrapeLog (audit trail), CreditUsage (billing), PriceHistory (price tracking), ScheduledScrape (recurring jobs), AnalyzedProduct (AI analysis results). Contains SCRAPE_TIERS pricing config, get_tier_config(), calculate_scrape_cost(), and utility helpers _utcnow(), _uuid(), _hash_url().

nodes.name: product/main.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI micro-service entry point on port 8106. ~80 endpoints covering: API key CRUD, product scraping (single URL, batch, platform-specific), AI analysis pipeline, Google Sheets export, scheduled scrape management, pricing tiers, usage tracking. Imports and orchestrates all other modules. Includes dynamic platform scraper registry (TikTokShop, Shopee, Lazada).

nodes.name: product/scraper.py
nodes.summary: Multi-layer product scraping engine with stealth anti-detection. Fallback chain: HTTP+regex → Playwright stealth → JSON-LD → Nuxt state extraction → API intercept. Supports TikTok Shop, Shopee, Lazada, Boots, Watsons, Amazon, Central, JIB, Powerbuy. Features proxy rotation with auto-failover, session persistence, human-like scrolling/delays, WebGL spoofing, and site-specific parsing helpers (_parse_shopee_api, _parse_lazada_api, _parse_tiktok_api).

nodes.name: product/scraper_service.py
nodes.summary: Service layer for product scraper: API key management (create, validate, list, revoke with monthly quotas), Redis-backed caching with TTL, scrape logging and usage tracking, cost deduction with per-user tier billing, Google Sheets pipeline export, scheduled scrape CRUD, category detection from product names, and the primary scrape_with_tracking() function that orchestrates cache→scrape→log→bill flow.

nodes.name: product/analyze_pipeline.py
nodes.summary: Three-stage AI analysis pipeline: ProductNormalizer (normalize raw scraped data from TikTok/Shopee/Lazada into UnifiedProduct), ProductEnricher (call Mistral API for category detection, Thai translation, keyword extraction), ProductExporter (format for TUS-ready output with sorting/filtering). Includes local image download via proxy, TTLCache, ErrorRateLimiter, and entry points analyze_product() and batch_analyze(). Re-exports DB functions from analyzer_db.py.

nodes.name: product/analyzer.py
nodes.summary: AI vision analyzer using Mistral Pixtral for product image analysis (name, price, brand, SKU extraction). Also provides OpenCode API enrichment for Thai translation, keyword extraction, and category detection. Includes rule-based viral potential scoring (0-100). Used as fallback when Playwright extraction fails.

nodes.name: product/analyzer_db.py
nodes.summary: Async PostgreSQL CRUD layer for AnalyzedProduct via shared.database. Supports dedup by product_id+source or title+source, aggregate stats (avg rating, avg viral score, trending count, top categories), filtered queries with pagination and sorting by viral_score, and batch storage. Used by analyze_pipeline for persistence.

nodes.name: product/export_service.py
nodes.summary: Google Sheets export service using gspread + service account auth. Functions: is_ready() checks for credentials, export_products_to_sheet() pushes scraped product data to a Sheet with append/replace modes, get_setup_instructions() returns GCP setup guide. Uses local sheets_credentials.json for auth.

nodes.name: product/scheduler.py
nodes.summary: Background scheduler loop that checks PostgreSQL every 60 seconds for due ScheduledScrape jobs. Executes via scraper_service.run_scheduled_scrape() and updates next_run based on schedule (hourly/daily/weekly/monthly). Entry point: start_scheduler() for asyncio background task.

nodes.name: product/platforms/__init__.py
nodes.summary: Package init for platforms/ — empty, makes it a Python package.

nodes.name: product/platforms/base.py
nodes.summary: Abstract base class BaseScraper(ABC) with abstract method scrape(url) -> dict. Defines the interface all platform-specific scrapers must implement.

nodes.name: product/platforms/lazada.py
nodes.summary: Lazada platform scraper. Uses Playwright stealth browser to scrape product pages with CSS selectors for name, price, images, description. Handles Lazada-specific page structure and extracts to a standardized dict format.

nodes.name: product/platforms/shopee.py
nodes.summary: Shopee platform scraper. Uses Playwright to extract product data from Shopee pages with specific CSS selectors for name, price, images, description. Handles Shopee's unique page DOM structure.

nodes.name: product/platforms/tiktok_shop.py
nodes.summary: TikTok Shop platform scraper. Contains SelectorEngine class for flexible DOM traversal and TikTokShopScraper that extends BaseScraper. Handles TikTok Shop's dynamic page structure with Playwright stealth.
